title: Senior Software Engineer - DXC Technology India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - DXC Technology India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at DXC Technology India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Software Engineer to strengthen our Delhi-based team.

About DXC Technology India:
DXC Technology India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DXC Technology India!
